elements.name: TC-GEN-001 Unsupported resource type returns 404 and OperationOutcome

steps.name: match each response.issue contains { severity: '#present', code: '#present' }

name: common/general.feature
description:
General FHIR API Behaviour
Tests general API behaviour not specific to a single resource type,
  per REQ-GEN-003.
